data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding minimum remaining-validity days.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of requirement items with minimum remaining-validity days, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these items, yet the prior step evidence does not include any checks or data related to remaining-validity days. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of requirement items with minimum remaining-validity days.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
